starry_unigraph.backends.ctdg.historical_cache module

class starry_unigraph.backends.ctdg.historical_cache.AdaParameter(alpha: float = 0.5, min_alpha: float = 0.1, max_alpha: float = 0.95)[source]

Bases: object

Adaptive threshold for HistoricalCache — adjusts based on sync/compute latency ratio.

alpha: float = 0.5
max_alpha: float = 0.95
min_alpha: float = 0.1
update_from_latency(sync_ms: float, compute_ms: float) → None[source]

Tighten threshold when sync is cheap relative to compute; loosen otherwise.

class starry_unigraph.backends.ctdg.historical_cache.CTDGHistoricalCache(num_shared: int, hidden_dim: int, device: str, num_nodes: int | None = None, shared_node_ids: Tensor | None = None, ada_param: AdaParameter | None = None)[source]

Bases: object

Per-rank cache for shared-node memory snapshots.

Tracks the last-synced memory for shared nodes and provides a boolean mask indicating which nodes have changed enough to warrant a new sync.

bind_shared_nodes(num_nodes: int, shared_node_ids: Tensor) → None[source]

Bind fixed global shared-node IDs to cache slot indices.

historical_check(shared_node_local_indices: Tensor, current_memory: Tensor) → Tensor[source]

Return True for nodes whose memory has drifted beyond alpha threshold.

slot_indices(node_ids: Tensor) → Tensor[source]
synchronize_shared_update(received_node_ids: Tensor, received_values: Tensor, received_ts: Tensor) → None[source]

Apply received updates to cached snapshot, keeping only newer timestamps.

update_cache(shared_indices: Tensor, new_memory: Tensor, new_ts: Tensor) → None[source]

Update cache after a successful sync.
